verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Let the heavens rejoice Let the earth be glad Let the people of God Sing His praise All over the land Everyone in the valley Come and lift your voice All those on the mountaintop be glad Shout for joy

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Rise up and praise Him He deserves our love Rise up and praise Him Worship the Holy One With all your heart With all your soul With all your might Rise up and praise Him
